phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book a guided visit
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo reservar una visita guiada aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-ser-BAHR OO-nah bee-SEE-tah gee-AH-dah ah-KEE

likely_response.local: En la oficina de turismo, calle Mayor.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH too-REE-smoh KAHL-leh mah-YOHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the tourist office, Mayor street.

responses.english: At the tourist office, Mayor street.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah DEH too-REE-smoh KAHL-leh mah-YOHR
responses.french: En la oficina de turismo, calle Mayor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best photo viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿cuál es el mejor sitio para fotos?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, kwahl es el meh-HOHR see-tee-oh pah-rah FOH-tohs?

likely_response.local: Suba al mirador del Ayuntamiento, vistas al mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh BEE-stahs AHL MAHR
likely_response.translation_en: From the square, facing the facade.

responses.english: From the square, facing the facade.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEHL ah-yoon-tah-mee-EHN-toh BEE-stahs AHL MAHR
responses.french: Suba al mirador del Ayuntamiento, vistas al mar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which rooms are open to visitors
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué salas están abiertas al público?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh SAH-lahs eh-STAHN ah-BEE-ehr-tahs al poo-BLEE-koh?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Belle Époque features are
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo ver los detalles Belle Époque del edificio?
phrases.pronunciation: DÓN-deh poo-EH-doh BEHR LOHS deh-TAHL-lehs BEHL-leh É-poh-k-eh DEHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh

likely_response.local: En la escalera imperial y el Salón Principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah eem-peh-ree-AHL Y EHL sah-LÓN preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: On the imperial staircase and the Main Hall.

responses.english: On the imperial staircase and the Main Hall.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah eem-peh-ree-AHL Y EHL sah-LÓN preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: En la escalera imperial y el Salón Principal.
